message:
Add POST /run/:id API endpoint for triggering scenario execution

Accepts target (required), adapter (default "web"), and model
(falls back to VET_AGENT_MODEL env). Returns 404/400 for validation
errors. Tests cover routing and validation paths only — the full
agent loop is already covered by e2e tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
